message:
fix(db): harden timestamp parsing, replace Vec with VecDeque for bounded collections, and drop RETURNING for frankensqlite compat

- migrate: rewrite strip_timezone_suffix to use byte-level checks avoiding
  char-boundary panics on malformed timestamps; add regression tests
- queries: replace RETURNING-based ID retrieval with deterministic SELECT
  after insert for frankensqlite compatibility; simplify reservation
  release eligibility check since ACTIVE_RESERVATION_PREDICATE already
  excludes released rows
- s3fifo: add regression test for ghost eviction duplicate-seq bug
- search_cache: switch CacheInvalidator events from Vec to VecDeque to
  avoid O(n) remove(0) on bounded event history
- tracking: rename TrackerAux to QueryTrackerAux, switch slow_queries
  from Vec to VecDeque, simplify snapshot() method, fix clippy lints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
